scope: Level A and AA Success Criteria only; 4.1.1 Parsing is obsolete and excluded.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Cannot judge whether existing alt text is useful; decorative detection is heuristic.
Filename-based heuristic; an image named chart.png can still be decorative.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: The transcript search is a rough text heuristic; a transcript may exist on a linked page.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Only sees <track> elements; player-level, platform, or burned-in captions are invisible.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: A table can be a layout table; the check skips role=presentation and single-row/column tables but cannot always tell intent.
Detects * or 'required' in an associated label without required/aria-required on the control.
Inline-style heuristic (large bold text in div/span); many false positives are possible in decorated content, so this is review evidence only.
Multiple h1 elements are valid HTML and often intentional; this is review evidence only.
Only checks fieldset/legend and role=radiogroup with an accessible name; other grouping idioms need review.
Only detects missing label association, not other relationship failures.
Skipped levels are not automatically WCAG failures; independent regions and embedded components can legitimately restart levels.
WCAG does not require an h1; this is structural review evidence.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Detects inline CSS order/grid placement that can desynchronize visual and DOM order, but cannot determine intended meaning.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Keyword pattern heuristic; the surrounding text may also give non-sensory identification.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Requires strong static restriction evidence such as rotate messaging, orientation-lock code, or orientation-specific hidden content.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Compares inferred purpose with the token; ambiguous labels and localized forms can require review.
Conservative token map for common personal-data fields; custom or ambiguous fields are skipped, and search/one-time-code fields are excluded.
Flags autocomplete metadata on controls that normally do not collect reusable personal data.
Validates known autocomplete detail tokens but cannot prove the field purpose.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Looks for status/selection classes or inline color cues while excluding common non-color alternatives; final computed presentation is not measured.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Detects native autoplay audio without controls; duration and custom controls require rendered-page review.

evidence_produced: rendered geometry and computed style evidence
limitations: Computed-color sampling; gradients, images, and overlays force a needs_review confidence instead.
The background stack includes an image, gradient, or transparency, so the ratio cannot be computed reliably.

evidence_produced: rendered geometry and computed style evidence
limitations: Viewport-based emulation approximates but does not equal text-only scaling to 200%.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Uses SVG text or image filename evidence; it does not perform OCR or judge exceptions such as logos.

evidence_produced: rendered geometry and computed style evidence
limitations: Bounding boxes from one run; animation and lazy layout can shift results.
Bounding-box intersection cannot judge visual intent; intentional stacking can be fine.
Legacy check kept for old reports; replaced by reflow_horizontal_scroll.
Legacy check kept for old reports; replaced by the reflow_* checks.
Zoom is emulated through equivalent viewport widths in one Chromium run; intentional scroll regions (data tables, maps) are allowed by WCAG.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.

evidence_produced: rendered geometry and computed style evidence
limitations: Applies the WCAG reference text-spacing overrides and compares clipping/overlap before and after; loss caused by JavaScript reacting to resize is not modeled.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Static event/CSS evidence cannot verify dismissible, hoverable, or persistent behavior.

evidence_produced: keyboard traversal and browser interaction evidence
safe keyboard workflow evidence
limitations: Counts common focusable selectors in one Chromium run.
Headless Tab behavior can differ from a desktop browser session.
Proves one scripted path failed under keyboard-only interaction, not that every path fails.
The Tab search has a fixed press budget and may miss controls on very long pages.

evidence_produced: keyboard traversal and browser interaction evidence
limitations: Observed Tab-only behavior; a documented escape mechanism (Escape, arrow keys) would not be seen.
Repeated focus suggests but does not prove a trap.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Script heuristic for unmodified single-character key listeners; minified code and typing-field exceptions require manual testing.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Detects meta refresh, timeout scripts, and countdown language, but not all timing exceptions or custom adjustment controls.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Detects common auto-moving/update patterns and visible pause/stop/hide controls; duration and process exceptions require review.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: CSS keyframe/duration evidence suggests rapid flashing but does not measure luminance area or precise flash thresholds.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Fires only for pages with a substantial repeated navigation block and no skip link, main landmark, or heading-based structure; other bypass mechanisms may exist.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Titles set by JavaScript are only visible in browser mode.

evidence_produced: keyboard traversal and browser interaction evidence
safe keyboard workflow evidence
limitations: One headless run; focus handling can differ with browser UI present.
Reachability failure often indicates focus-order problems too.
Visibility is estimated from size and CSS; skip links that appear on focus are a valid pattern.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Generic visible text can still be acceptable when programmatic context (aria-labelledby, list context) disambiguates it.
Only detects empty names, not misleading ones.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Absence of an h1 is not itself a 2.4.6 failure.

evidence_produced: keyboard traversal and browser interaction evidence
rendered geometry and computed style evidence
limitations: An invisible focused element usually has no visible indicator, but the pattern needs human judgment.

Compares focused and unfocused computed styles (outline, box-shadow, border, background, text-decoration, transform, pseudo-elements, parent styles) in one Chromium run; animated or canvas-drawn indicators can still be missed.

evidence_produced: rendered geometry and computed style evidence
limitations: Bounding-box and hit-test sampling against sticky/fixed overlays in one run; overlays that appear only after user actions are not seen.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Event-name heuristic for swipe, pinch, path, or pointer-move interactions; visible alternatives are inferred from control text.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Requires down-event evidence and no obvious up/cancel handler, but cannot verify final activation behavior.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Normalized substring comparison of visible text vs aria-label; icon-only and very short labels are skipped.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Detects draggable markup or drag/drop script names and common non-drag alternatives; cannot prove dragging is required.

evidence_produced: rendered geometry and computed style evidence
limitations: Measured in one Chromium run at default zoom; inline text links and targets with sufficient surrounding spacing are excluded, but equivalent-control and essential exceptions need human judgment.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Direct for static HTML; a lang attribute added by JavaScript would be missed in static mode.
Unicode-range script detection; languages sharing a script cannot be told apart.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Conservative heuristic; may flag intentional bilingual lines.
Fires only when the script itself contradicts the declaration.
Same script heuristic; transliterated text is invisible.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Inline onfocus-handler evidence only; external scripts and actual browser state changes require interaction testing.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Inline input/change-handler evidence only; external scripts and warning mechanisms may be missed.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.
No implemented A11yway rule currently produces criterion-specific evidence.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Static error markup is inspected for aria-invalid/aria-describedby association; runtime validation may be different.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Static HTML only; labels added by JavaScript are seen only in browser mode.
The visible instruction exists; only the programmatic exposure is missing.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Checks static error text for common correction guidance words; it cannot judge all useful suggestions.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Keyword heuristic for high-consequence public forms; it does not submit forms or inspect later workflow steps.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Single-page repeated-field inference only; full redundant-entry testing needs a controlled workflow.

evidence_produced: source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Public-page heuristic for paste blocking and CAPTCHA-like challenge text; authentication is never attempted.

evidence_produced: computed accessibility-tree evidence
keyboard traversal and browser interaction evidence
source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: A missing label usually means a missing accessible name, but the browser may compute one from other sources.
Chromium's computed tree in one run; real screen readers apply their own rules.
Heuristic name estimate; only used when accessibility tree data is unavailable.
Static heuristic on source HTML.
Static heuristic; icon fonts and JavaScript-injected names are invisible statically.

evidence_produced: safe keyboard workflow evidence
source markup and parsed element evidence
limitations: Compares normalized visible text only; the status may exist but use different wording.
Static status-like content only; dynamic before/after accessibility-tree behavior is not reproduced.
